title: barleria scabriuscula
intro: Barleria scabriuscula, also known as the rough-leaved barleria, is a plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Barleria scabriuscula include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
